privacy.NSCameraUsageDescription: Camera access is required to scan documents and take photos in this app.
privacy.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Face ID is required to authenticate using face recognition.
privacy.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: This app needs access to your location even in the background to automatically start uploading files when significant movement is detected. GPS is not used.
privacy.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: The app uses your location to automatically trigger file uploads when you move between areas.
privacy.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app uses your location to detect movement and automatically upload files. It does not use GPS and does not store your location.
privacy.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Microphone access is required to create voice notes.
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: This lets you upload and save photos using this app. Photos can then be browsed and viewed via the Media tab.
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This lets you upload and save photos using this app. Photos can then be browsed and viewed via the Media tab.
